sequence.title: Pause AG47 and Open Astro-Drishvara Data Foundation
Source Authenticity and Regional Acceptance Doctrine
sequence.purpose: Define source hierarchy, Nityanand Mishra ji style discipline, classical sources, and regional accepted Panchang traditions.

sequence.title: Panchanga Ontology and Canonical Field Model
sequence.purpose: Define tithi, vara, nakshatra, yoga, karana, rashi, muhurta, paksha, samvat, ayana, ritu, chandrabalam/tarabalam and related fields.

sequence.title: Regional Panchang Rule Profiles
sequence.purpose: Record North, East, Bihar/UP/Kashi-Mithila and South Indian Panchangam rule-profile differences.

sequence.title: Classical Astronomical and Calendar Calculation Methodology
sequence.purpose: Record calculation methodology boundaries, ayanamsha/correction awareness and sunrise/locality rules.

sequence.title: Word, Sanskrit Name, Sutra and Reflection Corpus Schema
sequence.purpose: Define word/name/sutra/reflection data model using Sanskritic discipline.

sequence.title: Vedic Guidance and Star Reflection Rule Model
sequence.purpose: Define guidance/star-reflection rules as non-deterministic reflective interpretations.

sequence.title: Supabase and Local Database Schema Planning
sequence.purpose: Map AD tables to the existing Supabase content-publishing schema without SQL execution.

sequence.title: Seed Data and Source Attribution Register
sequence.purpose: Define seed-data ingestion, source attribution and editorial verification requirements.

sequence.title: Safety, Non-claim and Cultural Integrity Audit
sequence.purpose: Audit non-claim language, cultural respect, regional difference handling and safety.

sequence.title: Astro-Drishvara Data Foundation Closure
sequence.purpose: Close AD and allow AG47 to resume using ADZ as source-of-truth.
